title: RecognizedHoleGroup Object
description: Object that represents a collection of holes that contain similar geometry. Holes have similar geometry if they contain the same segment types with the same segment heights, diameters, etc...

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: item
methods.description: Returns the hole at the specified index from this hole group.

methods.name: recognizeHoleGroups
methods.description: **RETIRED** Gets all recognized holes and returns them as hole groupings based on similar geometry.

methods.name: recognizeHoleGroupsWithInput
methods.description: Gets all recognized holes and returns them as hole groupings based on similar geometry.

properties.name: count
properties.description: Returns the number of holes contained in this hole group.

properties.name: hasErrors
properties.description: Returns true if there are any errors associated with this hole group.

properties.name: hasWarnings
properties.description: Returns true if there are any warnings associated with this hole group.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

related_samples.name: Create Setups From Hole Recognition API Sample
related_samples.description: This sample script demonstrates how to create a correctly oriented setup using Hole Recognition functionality.The Fusion Manufacturing Extension is required for Hole Recognition.The script starts by opening a sample model from the CAM Samples folder via its URN. The model comprises a 3 way coupling containing holes in various orientations and mounted on a fixture. A reference setup is created for the model using a simple stock mode and offsets. The Hole Recognition feature of the Fusion Manufacturing Extension creates 5 hole groups containing 11 holes between them. For each unique hole group vector captured, a new setup is created and its orientation transformed to match the vector.

related_samples.name: Hole and Pocket Recognition API Sample
related_samples.description: This sample script demonstrates three different methods for feature recognition: one for holes and two for pockets.The script starts by creating a simple component which is then used to demonstrate the three methods. After the features are recognised they are coloured and milling and drilling operations are created for each feature.RecognizedHoleGroup returns a list of BRepFaces that can be used as selections for the drilling operation. RecognizedPocket also return some BRepFaces but it needs additional processing before the output can be used for creating machining operations.The sample script demonstrates a couple of different methods, including finding the pocket BRepFaces and creating sketches from the recognized pockets.This script works only if the Manufacturing Extension is active.

classType.title: RecognizedHoleGroup.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

item.title: RecognizedHoleGroup.item Method
item.description: Returns the hole at the specified index from this hole group.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: The index of the hole within this hole group to return. The first hole in this hole group has an index of 0.

recognizeHoleGroups.title: RecognizedHoleGroup.recognizeHoleGroups Method
recognizeHoleGroups.description: This function is retired. See more information in the 'Remarks' section below. Gets all recognized holes and returns them as hole groupings based on similar geometry. Remarks

parameters.name: bodies
parameters.description: Model bodies on which to recognize holes.

recognizeHoleGroupsWithInput.title: RecognizedHoleGroup.recognizeHoleGroupsWithInput Method
recognizeHoleGroupsWithInput.description: Gets all recognized holes and returns them as hole groupings based on similar geometry.

parameters.name: bodies
parameters.description: Model bodies on which to recognize holes.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Input object that contains filtering settings
